title: Invalid timezone set in n8n server
symptom: When attempting to activate a workflow, n8n throws an 'invalid timezone' error message.
applies_when: n8n server timezone is set incorrectly
User attempts to activate a workflow
not_this_if: Timezone is set correctly to a valid region
root_cause: The n8n server's timezone setting is likely configured to an invalid value, such as UTC, which does not correspond to a recognized timezone. This leads to errors when workflows are activated that require a valid timezone.
fix_steps: Access the n8n server environment variables
Set the TIMEZONE variable to a valid timezone, e.g., 'Europe/London'
Alternatively, adjust the timezone in the workflow settings via the top right menu.
agent_instruction: Set the n8n server timezone to a valid region like 'Europe/London'.
